competitions.name: Spring Championship Show 2025
competitions.description: Our flagship spring event featuring all breeds and disciplines. Open to all ages and experience levels.

classes.name: Best Stallion
classes.description: Open to all stallions 4 years and over. Judged on conformation, movement, and presence.

classes.name: Best Mare
classes.description: Open to all mares 4 years and over. Judged on conformation, type, and quality.

classes.name: Best Youngstock
classes.description: Open to horses and ponies aged 1-3 years. Future stars of the show ring.

competitions.name: Summer Classic 2025
competitions.description: Three days of spectacular showing across multiple disciplines. Join us for the ultimate summer horse show experience.

classes.name: Show Jumping
classes.description: Riders and horses compete over a course of coloured fences in an enclosed arena.

classes.name: Dressage
classes.description: The art of horse riding and training. Horses and riders perform a series of movements.

competitions.name: Autumn Grand Prix 2025
competitions.description: The grand finale of the show season. Only the best compete for the ultimate titles.

classes.name: Grand Champion
classes.description: The most prestigious title of the show season. Open to all supreme champions.
